name: Ventricular Parasystole
identifyBy: Wide ectopic QRS complexes at a mathematically fixed rate (parasystolic rate)
Inter-ectopic intervals are multiples of the shortest inter-ectopic interval
Fusion beats - hybrid QRS when sinus and ventricular impulse coincide
Protected focus - entrance block prevents sinus resetting of ventricular focus

measurements.rate: Variable - sinus rhythm plus independent ventricular rate

management: Usually benign if structurally normal heart - no treatment required
Distinguish from fixed-coupling PVCs (different mechanism, different implications)
Cardiology review if symptomatic or high burden
Treat underlying disease if cardiomyopathy or ischaemia present
pearls: Parasystole = independent protected pacemaker in the ventricle - protected by entrance block (sinus cannot reset it)
Key feature: variable coupling interval (distance from preceding sinus beat to ectopic varies)
The parasystolic rate can be calculated: all inter-ectopic intervals are multiples of the basic rate
Fusion beats (hybrid morphology) are common - QRS is intermediate between sinus and ectopic
Uncommon and often unrecognised - requires careful measurement of inter-ectopic intervals

qaNotes: Underlying sinus rhythm with intermittent premature wide ventricular complexes.
